scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) propagates RuntimeException from TreeBuilder.parse
scenarios.expectedResult: CustomRuntimeException is thrown with original message
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseInput(String) propagates builder exception
@Override public ParseSettings defaultSettings() { return new ParseSettings(ParseErrorList.noErrors()); }

@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element context, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }
@Override public boolean isContentForTagData(String name) { return false; }
